headline: Linde Expands Material Handling Reach As Valuation Stays Above Fair Value
summary: Linde appointed Bisedge as the exclusive dealer for its Material Handling equipment in South Africa. The company received formal approval to integrate UgoWork lithium ion battery solutions into its equipment lineup. Linde (NasdaqGS:LIN) is expanding its Material Handling footprint in South Africa through an exclusive dealership agreement with Bisedge, aiming to deepen its reach and service coverage in that market. The move comes as Linde's share price stands at $495.76, with the stock up...

headline: Bisedge Appointed Exclusive Dealer for Linde Material Handling in South Africa
summary: Bisedge, a leader in sustainable logistics solutions, is proud to announce that it has been appointed as the exclusive dealer for Linde Material Handling products in South Africa, effective 1st April 2026.

headline: Lindian raises A$100M to fast-track Kangankunde expansion and downstream push
summary: Lindian Resources Ltd (ASX:LIN, OTC:LINIF) has secured firm commitments to raise A$100 million through an institutional placement, strengthening its balance sheet and accelerating development across its flagship Kangankunde rare earths project and downstream processing strategy. The...
